## Type of change

- [ ] Research / methodology doc (under `000-docs/` or `research/`)
- [ ] New experiment sandbox (under `sandboxes/`)
- [ ] Reusable script (under `scripts/`)
- [ ] Documentation fix
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] Branch follows `feat/...` / `fix/...` / `docs/...` / `research/...` / `chore/...` naming
- [ ] If adding a sandbox, includes a `REPORT.md`
- [ ] If adding methodology, references at least one empirical sandbox run or external citation
- [ ] No partner-engagement-specific details exposed publicly
- [ ] **Ratified-clause-conflict check (DR-085 D1):** I checked the governing Decision Records for contradictory ratified clauses on any one-way-door artifact this PR touches (predicate / signed schema / kernel entity); if I found one I HALTED and escalated rather than resolving it silently. (Run `scripts/ratified-clause-conflict-check.sh` for the reminder + DR pointers.)
